Judge: Joseph M. Quinn: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JMQ)

Cross-Defendant And Crosscomplainant, De Wolf Realty Cos Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Compel Plaintiff,Truck Insurance Exchange?S Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set Number Two
Off Calendar May-19-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. No opposition filed. The Court notes that there is no demand for the Court to impose sanctions and proposed order this is submitted does not request sanctions.

Therefore, the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:
CROSS-DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT DE WOLFE REALTY OMPANY'S (HEREAFTER EITHER "CROSS-COMPLAINTANT" OR "DEWOLFE") MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TRUCK INSURANCE EXCHANGE (HEREAFTER EITHER "PLAINTIFF" OR "TRUCK") TO COMPEL TRUCK TO RESPOND TO DEWOLFE'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS SET TWO IS UNOPPOSED AND IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS:

(1) WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, TRUCK WILL DELIVER TO DEWOLFE, WITHOUT OBJECTION ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS CALLED FOR BY ITS REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS.
(2) IF TRUCK IS WITHHOLDING ANY RESPONSIVE DOCUMENT ON THE GROUNDS OF ATTORNEY CLIENT OR WORK PRODUCT PRIVILEGE IS WILL IDENTIFY EACH SUCH DOCUMENT WITH SUFFICIENT SPECIFICITY TO ALLOW DEWOLFE TO CHALLENGE THE VALIDITY OF THE CLAIM.
(3) MOVING PARTY HAS NOT SOUGHT ANY SANCTIONS AND NONE WILL BE IMPOSED AGAINST ANY PARTY IN THIS LITIGATION.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: R. Sahatjian, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
